node.goal: Implement argument_density_view.py: format S03 ArgumentDensityProfile → per-section density table + low_density_sections list + JSON dict + ≥6 unit tests + fixtures (partial + full)
acceptance: format_argument_density(profile) -> str function exists and pure
no network imports / random / datetime / mock

architecture_policy.package_boundary: harness/lib/research/survey/cli/** + harness/lib/orchestration/** + harness/cli/cmd_status_epic.py only; no main architecture rewrite
architecture_policy.plugin_boundary: package-first; view registered via @register_view decorator in survey/cli/_views_registry.py

exploration_alternatives.label: argument_density_view pure-function view + @register_view decorator
exploration_alternatives.rationale: minimal surface, attach-only, deterministic, easy to unit-test with fixture JSON

exploration_alternatives.label: rewrite survey-review output emission inline
exploration_alternatives.rationale: rejected — would modify frozen survey-* CLI entry; violates attach-only scope

exploration_alternatives.label: render table via external subprocess
exploration_alternatives.rationale: rejected — view as subprocess adds IO + non-determinism + breaks pure-function policy

kill_criteria: view function not pure (IO or random or datetime.now)
view modifies S03 dataclass public API
view uses @mock.patch or MagicMock in tests
view registered via direct dict mutation (must use @register_view decorator)
view writes outside its declared write_scope
